03 / Profile

The face, the frame, the frequency.

Rohith moves between screen and runway with the same ease — feature film billing one season, fashion-week walks the next. The throughline is presence: a face the camera holds onto.

This site is built as a single continuous reel rather than a static résumé — every frame links back to the same person, captured across studios, runways and city streets.

For collaborations, brand campaigns, screen tests or event bookings, reach out directly below.

04 / Transmission

Let's work together

Send a name, number, and a couple of reference photos — every inquiry routes straight to the inbox below.

First-time senders: FormSubmit asks you to confirm your email once — after that, every submission lands straight in the inbox.
